title: user — product analytics

events.name: User Provisioned
events.description: New User account created. `source` explains the entry point.

events.name: User Activated
events.description: User transitioned from pending to active.

events.name: User Suspended
events.description: reason_kind: manual / auto_inactive / policy_violation / compliance. Free-form reason text is NOT included — confidential-tier.

events.name: Profile Updated
events.description: `changed_fields_count` only — the actual field names would leak intent (e.g. someone updating phone_e164 is a security-relevant signal).

events.name: Active Tenant Switched
events.description: The full multi-tenant journey. Feeds the tenant-switcher usage dashboard.

events.name: Preferred Locale Changed
events.description: User changed their preferred locale via /me.

events.name: User Bulk Invite Started
events.description: CSV bulk-invite kicked off. Feeds the tenant-onboarding funnel.

notes: The subject User's `email` is never a Segment property — it's PII. `user_id` (ULID) is the anonymised identifier.
`identify` calls happen at auth-time, not in this module. This module only ships `track` events.
